label: Targeting parameters
description: Constrains which targets a verb or ability can select.

canTargetLocations.label: Can target locations
canTargetLocations.description: Whether empty map cells can be targeted (e.g. mortar fire).

canTargetSelf.label: Can target self
canTargetSelf.description: Whether the caster can target themselves.

canTargetHumans.label: Can target humans
canTargetHumans.description: Whether human pawns specifically can be targeted.

canTargetAnimals.label: Can target animals
canTargetAnimals.description: Whether animal pawns can be targeted.

canTargetMechs.label: Can target mechs
canTargetMechs.description: Whether mechanoid pawns can be targeted.

canTargetMutants.label: Can target mutants
canTargetMutants.description: Whether mutant pawns (Anomaly expansion) can be targeted.

canTargetFires.label: Can target fires
canTargetFires.description: Whether fire things can be targeted.

canTargetItems.label: Can target items
canTargetItems.description: Whether items on the ground can be targeted.

mapObjectTargetsMustBeAutoAttackable.label: Map objects must be auto-attackable
mapObjectTargetsMustBeAutoAttackable.description: If true, map objects can only be targeted if they are flagged as auto-attackable.

targetingRangeOverride.label: Targeting range override
targetingRangeOverride.description: Overrides the verb range for targeting purposes. -1 means use the verb's own range.

onlyTargetFlammables.label: Only target flammables
onlyTargetFlammables.description: If true, only flammable targets can be selected (used for incendiary attacks).

mustBeSelectable.label: Must be selectable
mustBeSelectable.description: If true, only selectable things can be targeted.

neverTargetDowned.label: Never target downed
neverTargetDowned.description: If true, downed pawns are excluded from valid targets.

neverTargetIncapacitated.label: Never target incapacitated
neverTargetIncapacitated.description: If true, incapacitated pawns are excluded from valid targets.

onlyTargetIncapacitated.label: Only target incapacitated
onlyTargetIncapacitated.description: If true, only incapacitated pawns can be targeted.

thingCategory.label: Thing category
thingCategory.description: Restricts valid targets to things of this broad category.
